text: The application of estrace relieved vaginal dryness virtually overnight. It also caused reduction of pain during intercourse. Improved sex drive and response. The application of estrace didn't appear to have side effects initially, however, upon continued use severe irritation of the vaginal lining occurred as well as a severe yeast infection. Yeast infection was so severe it required prescription medication to clear up. Estrace was applied vaginally 3x weekly.
